mainEntity.name: In Ogden UT, comp for idiopathic fall hurting back?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if floor aggravated—UT appeals win[3].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if hard work floor worsened injury per Ackley case.** Not just risk, actual aggravation[3]. **Key factors:** Floor hardness evidence. **Practical guidance:** Medical on increased damage, appeal denials. Utah Court of Appeals clarified[3]. **Compensable now.**
